caption:
Ask ten customers how they found you.

Most say a friend told them. Almost none of that shows up in your books.

Here's the system Black Arrow builds to fix it. Example workflow, illustrative, not a client account:

1. Every past customer gets one private link tied to their name.
2. A friend clicks it, lands on your booking page. The visit tags itself to the referrer.
3. The friend books and shows. Both customers get notified.
4. One report shows exactly who sent you the most business this year.

No tool yet? Start the manual version this week.

Add a column to your customer list called 'Referred by' and ask every new lead the question. You can't reward what you can't see.

See the tracked version running on your own numbers.

DM TRIAL

#ServiceBusiness #ReferralMarketing #CRMForContractors #SpeedToLead #LocalServiceMarketing
rationale: Fills the under-served Demonstrations/System Walkthroughs slot with the one system stage this account hasn't shown yet (customer referral tracking), rendered as a slideshow per the category's format guidance for motion-driven step reveals.
